name: Unicopia
short_description: Unicopia is a retro 2D platformer featuring a Unicorn racing to rescue her girlfriend from the clutches of an Evil Poodle. Jump up and down towers, collect gems, and reveal the key before the clock strikes and you're haunted by the ghost of time!
detailed_description:
Unicopia is a retro 2D platformer featuring a Unicorn racing to rescue her girlfriend from the clutches of an Evil Poodle. Jump up and down towers, collect gems, and reveal the key before the clock strikes and you're haunted by the ghost of time!

FEATURES


  • Retro arcade platforming action fulfilling all your Unicorn needs
  • Cute 2D pixel art made from dipping pixels in fairy dust
  • Style it your way in plain, CRT, and MAX CRT modes
  • Chiptune music straight from a 90s time machine
  • Beat bosses to unlock new realms
  • Play over 45 levels in story mode, arcade mode, or freeplay
  • Gobble fruit at snack time
  • Grab awards for points, for speed, or, for completionists, both!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
